text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, September 28. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Planning our weekly meals today. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
